scripts.test: export $(grep TEST_DATABASE_URL .env) && DATABASE_URL=$TEST_DATABASE_URL node --import tsx --test --test-concurrency=1 tests/integration/*.test.ts
scripts.test:watch: export $(grep TEST_DATABASE_URL .env) && DATABASE_URL=$TEST_DATABASE_URL node --import tsx --test --watch tests/integration/*.test.ts
scripts.db:migrate:test: export $(grep TEST_DATABASE_URL .env) && DATABASE_URL=$TEST_DATABASE_URL npx prisma migrate deploy
